changesProposed.name: Cerebras

current.name: Cerebras
current.founder: Andrew Feldman, Gary Lauterbach, Michael James, Sean Lie, Jean-Philippe Fricker

verified.name: Cerebras Systems Inc.
verified.description: An American semiconductor company that builds wafer-scale AI chips and systems for AI inference and training. The company's Wafer Scale Engine (WSE) is a single, wafer-scale integrated processor used in data centers for AI applications.
verified.notes: Company filed for IPO in September 2024, withdrew registration in October 2025, and filed again in April 2026. In May 2026, company filed amended registration statement for IPO on Nasdaq at $26.6B valuation, listing date May 14, 2026 under symbol CBRS. Wikipedia indicates company shifted to profitability in 2025 with net income of $87.9M on revenue of $510M. Database entry's reference to '$23B valuation' and 'Pre-IPO status' is outdated; current verified valuation is $26.6B and company is now public as of May 2026.

changesProposed.name: Fervo Energy

verified.name: Fervo Energy
verified.description: Geothermal energy company that generates electricity through enhanced geothermal systems (EGS) using horizontal drilling techniques adapted from oil and gas. Operates projects including Project Red in Nevada and Cape Station in Utah.
verified.notes: Company completed IPO in May 2026 (announced April 17, 2026; pricing announced May 12, 2026). Wikipedia source indicates company status as 'Private' but website and news sources confirm IPO completion in May 2026. Most recent funding: $462M Series E in November 2025, led by B Capital.

changesProposed.name: Nuro

verified.name: Nuro
verified.description: Autonomous vehicle technology company that develops Level 4 self-driving systems. Founded in 2016, initially focused on autonomous delivery vehicles before pivoting in September 2024 to licensing its proprietary Nuro Driver autonomy platform to automakers and mobility providers.
verified.notes: Company pivoted from autonomous delivery vehicles to licensing L4 autonomy technology in September 2024. Series E funding round opened in April 2025 ($106M) and closed in August 2025 ($97M additional). $6B valuation confirmed in August 2025 funding round with Uber and Nvidia.

changesProposed.name: OpenAI

current.name: OpenAI
current.founder: Sam Altman, Greg Brockman, Ilya Sutskever

verified.name: OpenAI
verified.description: American artificial intelligence research organization that developed the GPT family of large language models, DALL-E series of text-to-image models, and Sora series of text-to-video models. Released ChatGPT in November 2022.
verified.notes: Founded December 8, 2015 as nonprofit; transitioned to capped for-profit in 2019; 2025 restructuring converted subsidiary into public benefit corporation (PBC) 26% owned by nonprofit foundation. October 2025 $6.6 billion share sale valued company at $500 billion. Microsoft invested over $13 billion and owns 27%.

changesProposed.name: Rivian

verified.name: Rivian Automotive, Inc.
verified.description: American electric vehicle manufacturer founded in 2009 that produces electric SUVs (R1S), pickup trucks (R1T), and delivery vans on a skateboard platform. The company became public in November 2021.
verified.notes: Founded in Rockledge, Florida in June 2009, originally as Mainstream Motors, renamed to Avera Automotive and then Rivian Automotive in 2011. Headquarters now in Irvine, California. IPO on November 10, 2021. Wikipedia lists Ford's ownership at 1.6% as of 2024, down from earlier stakes mentioned in source.
